name: grimoire
description: Wire grimoire — a SQLite + sqlite-vec semantic datastore — into Claude Code. Ships a quickstart skill that silently verifies install, the default mount, and the MCP server registration; orients the user on six common ways people use grimoire (knowledge base, idempotency record, semantic memory, browsable log, decision log with precedent retrieval, translation memory); helps them pick one via AskUserQuestion; then runs a real first entry end-to-end via the mcp__grimoire__* tools so they leave with grimoire actually working. Finishes with a single copy-pastable bash line to delete the demo data. The conversation is the deliverable — no project files are written.
